metadata.description: Official Claude Code skills for ZenMux

plugins.name: zenmux-product
plugins.description: ZenMux product knowledge, onboarding, and feedback — answers questions about features, API, integration, pricing, and best practices from official docs, interactively guides tool/SDK configuration, and helps submit issues, feature requests, and product suggestions to GitHub

plugins.name: zenmux-management
plugins.description: ZenMux account management tools — query real-time subscription detail, quota usage, PAYG balance, Flow rate, and per-generation cost via the Management API

plugins.name: zenmux-creative
plugins.description: ZenMux creative generation — produce images via any ZenMux image model (gpt-image-2, Nano Banana Pro, Qwen, Doubao, ERNIE, GLM, Hunyuan, Kling, ...) with model-aware prompt optimization, multi-image reference support via local paths or URLs ([Image #N] convention), and 4-variant defaults saved locally for review
